_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in managing account access rights
reference_document_element_description: Manage data platform access controls, including role definitions, permission grants, access reviews, and privilege escalation procedures.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI DA domain. Task DA-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-016 (DA, cosine: 0.534), SP-K-004 (SP, cosine: 0.499).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.520). Shared vocabulary: [access]. NICE-only terms [account, managing, rights, skill] vs WIDAI-only terms [controls, data, definitions, escalation, grants, manage] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.893 (P=0.907, R=0.880). P exceeds R by 0.027 — the NICE element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 16 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Skill in managing account access rights" and "Manage data platform access controls, including role definitions, permission gra" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.591 > STS 0.520 (gap +0.072). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [access] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.0%. Shared tokens: [access]. NICE-only: [account, managing, rights, skill]. WIDAI-only: [controls, data, definitions, escalation, grants, manage].
